details.intro: Floors Center wanted to scale ecommerce revenue without sacrificing profitability. Rather than simply increasing traffic, the objective was to build a sustainable acquisition system capable of generating consistent online sales.
details.description: Floors Center wanted to scale ecommerce revenue without sacrificing profitability. Rather than simply increasing traffic, the objective was to build a sustainable acquisition system capable of generating consistent online sales.
details.challenge: The account required stronger Shopping campaign structure, improved product feed quality, and more reliable conversion tracking before it could scale efficiently.
details.solution: I optimized Google Shopping campaigns, refined Performance Max, improved Merchant Center product data, enhanced audience signals, and continuously monitored performance to maximize return on ad spend.
details.impact: Delivered outstanding campaign performance: $94K Ad Spend, $789K Revenue, 836% ROAS, Consistent Ecommerce Growth.

projects.img: /projects/AVA Recycling B2B/$9.31K Cost Spent Got 1.03K Leads at a Cost _ Conv of $9.01.png
projects.title: AVA Recycling B2B

details.intro: AVA Recycling needed a predictable system for generating qualified B2B recycling enquiries across the United States. The objective was to reduce wasted advertising spend while consistently attracting commercial clients ready to do business.
details.description: AVA Recycling needed a predictable system for generating qualified B2B recycling enquiries across the United States. The objective was to reduce wasted advertising spend while consistently attracting commercial clients ready to do business.
details.challenge: The existing Google Ads account was attracting residential enquiries instead of high-value commercial opportunities. This resulted in lower lead quality and made it difficult to maintain a profitable cost per acquisition.
details.solution: I rebuilt the account around commercial search intent, segmented campaigns by service type, introduced dedicated B2B landing pages, expanded negative keyword lists, and implemented accurate conversion tracking through Google Tag Manager. Every optimization focused on attracting businesses rather than consumers.
images: /projects/AVA Recycling B2B/AVA Last 90 Days Campaign Statistics.png
/projects/AVA Recycling B2B/$9.31K Cost Spent Got 1.03K Leads at a Cost _ Conv of $9.01.png
details.impact: Delivered outstanding campaign performance: $9.31K Ad Spend, 1,030 Qualified Leads, $9.01 Cost Per Lead, 412% ROAS.

projects.img: /projects/Google Tag Manager/GTM Tracking Customized Furnitures.png
projects.title: Google Tag Manager

details.intro: Accurate conversion tracking is the foundation of every successful Google Ads campaign. This project focused on implementing Google Tag Manager to provide reliable data for optimization.
details.description: Accurate conversion tracking is the foundation of every successful Google Ads campaign. This project focused on implementing Google Tag Manager to provide reliable data for optimization.
details.challenge: Without accurate tracking, campaign decisions were based on incomplete data, reducing the effectiveness of automated bidding and reporting.
details.solution: I implemented Google Tag Manager, configured conversion events, integrated GA4 with Google Ads, validated every trigger, and ensured accurate attribution across the customer journey.
images: /projects/Google Tag Manager/GTM Tracking Customized Furnitures.png
details.impact: Delivered outstanding campaign performance: Accurate Conversion Tracking, Reliable Reporting, Improved Optimization Decisions.

projects.title: Merchant Center

details.intro: A fully optimized Merchant Center is essential for profitable Shopping campaigns. This project focused on improving feed quality and resolving account issues.
details.description: A fully optimized Merchant Center is essential for profitable Shopping campaigns. This project focused on improving feed quality and resolving account issues.
details.challenge: Product disapprovals and incomplete feed attributes limited visibility and reduced Shopping campaign performance.
details.solution: I optimized product titles, attributes, categories, images, and feed quality while resolving Merchant Center diagnostics to improve product visibility.
images: /projects/Merchant Center/76K Approved Products on Merchant Center.png
details.impact: Delivered outstanding campaign performance: Improved Product Visibility, Reduced Feed Errors, Better Shopping Performance.
